Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: visual works by material or technique [300191091], visual works (works) [300191086], Visual Works (hierarchy name) [300179869], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: moving images [300263857], visual works by form of image [300191088], visual works by form [300191087], visual works (works) [300191086], Visual Works (hierarchy name) [300179869], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]

information artifacts by physical form [300137960], information artifacts [300230425], information forms (objects) [300220751], Information Forms (hierarchy name) [300026029], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]
Literary and Performing Arts Works (hierarchy name) [300400520], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Works presented in the form of a series of pictures carried on photographic film or video tape, presented to the eye in such rapid succession as to give the illusion of natural movement. For the study and practice of filmmaking and motion pictures as an art and form of expression, use "film (performing arts)."

Úsese para obras presentadas en forma de series de imágenes llevadas a película fotográfica o cinta de video, presentadas al ojo en una sucesión tan rápida como para dar la ilusión de movimiento natural. Para el estudio y práctica de la realización de películas y la cinematográfia como un arte y forma de expresión, use "película (artes interpretativas)".

Te gebruiken voor werken die bestaan uit een reeks plaatjes op fotografische film, die zo snel achter elkaar worden vertoond dat ze de illusie geven van een natuurlijke beweging. Voor het maken van films en de studie daarvan en voor films als kunst en vorm van expressie wordt 'film (uitvoerende kunsten)' gebruikt.
運用攝影或錄影帶中一系列的圖做為表達形式呈現而出的作品，以極快的速度連續展現於人的肉眼之前，以製造出自然動作的錯覺。若指稱電影製作的研究、實作以及電影作為一種藝術與表達形式，則使用「電影 (表演藝術)」一詞。

Source.Source_ID: 2000030701/Oakey, Dictionary of Film and Television Terms (1983)
2000043551/Worcester Art Museum Library, List of subject headings, unpub. (1976)

Term_Source.Page: seems to prefer moving pictures; motion pictures
seems to have no preference between films and motion pictures; motion pictures
